reconstruction.decision_under_review: Determine whether candidate material may enter composition without violating validity, privacy, or authority boundaries.
real_facts: One provider-candidate item is present with type context_factor.
uncertainty: Candidate content is not independently verified user fact.
risks: Candidate content may contain personal-data-like or invalid material.
privacy_concerns: Detect and categorize personal-data-like content without unnecessary reproduction.
reconstruction.controlled_failure_requirement: Reject unsafe or invalid material with a traceable disposition.
forbidden_conclusions: Treat candidate content as verified fact or reproduce identifiers unnecessarily.
reconstruction.clarification_behavior: No user clarification is needed for deterministic candidate validation.

results.rationale: Fresh reconstruction uses only the frozen blind source packet.
